title: selliguea macrophylla
intro: Selliguea macrophylla, also known as the Leathery Fern or Elephant Ear, is a perennial plant species in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selliguea macrophylla include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory and skin issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and side effects.
